{{Quote|She knows this crazy stuff pretty well. I guess it does look a lot like that Sith dealie in her bookpads, but what am I going to do? Arrest it?|CSF Detective Dherik Rule|<ref name="HNN29" />}}
'''Dherik Rule''' was a [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] [[Detective/Legends|detective]] for the area of [[Taung Heights]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Rule was on duty when he took a report from [[Latika Garboren]] who claimed finding a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] emblem in a dollop of [[pastebread]]. Rule acknowledged her complaint, however he failed to find a crime to pursue. Rule was later interviewed by [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] about the incident.<ref name="HNN29" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dherik Rule first appeared in an online issue of [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]], specifically [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 49]].

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|life/13328_2.html|Area Woman Finds Sith Icon in Pastebread}} {{1st}}
